message:
fix: wire refresh/retry buttons for Gateway Status, Cluster Network, Workload Deployment cards (#8730)

- Gateway Status: replace window.location.reload() with refetch() in retry button,
  add isRefreshing to useCardLoadingState
- Cluster Network: destructure isRefreshing from useClusters and pass to
  useCardLoadingState for refresh icon animation
- Workload Deployment: destructure isRefreshing from useCachedWorkloads and pass to
  useCardLoadingState, use t() for error message
- useGatewayStatus: add isRefreshing state, register with refetch registry so
  dashboard toolbar refresh button triggers data reload via triggerAllRefetches()

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2507,6 +2507,7 @@
     "itemCount_other": "{{count}} {{item}}",
     "errorLoading": "Error loading data",
     "failedToFetch": "Failed to fetch {{resource}}",
+    "failedToLoadWorkloads": "Failed to load workloads",
     "connectToCluster": "Connect to a cluster to view data",
     "demoData": "Demo data",
     "liveData": "Live data",
